Dunn-Smyth residuals for species richness from a gllvm object

Source: R/predictSR.gllvm.R
residuals.predictSR.gllvm.Rd

Calculates Dunn-Smyth residuals for species richness.

# S3 method for class 'predictSR.gllvm'
residuals(object, model, ...)

Arguments

object

object returned by "predictSR.gllvm"

model

an object of class 'gllvm'.

...

not used.

Value

A list of length 2 with 1) the fitted and 2) the dunn-smyth residuals.

Details

See "residuals.gllvm" for details.

See also

predict.gllvm, predictSR.gllvm, residuals.gllvm

Author

Bert van der Veen

Contents

Developed by Jenni Niku, Wesley Brooks, Riki Herliansyah, Francis K.C. Hui, Pekka Korhonen, Sara Taskinen, Bert van der Veen, David I. Warton.
